attributes.preview:
# dbGaP Data Access Request — Pre-filled Draft
## Study: phs003428.v1.p1 — CALGB/SWOG 80405

**Prepared:** 2025  
**Status:** READY TO SUBMIT (pending eRA Commons account and Institutional SO signature)  
**DAC:** NCI Data Access Committee (NCI DAC)  
**Submission portal:** https://dbgap.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/aa/wga.cgi  

---

## ⚠️ CTEP PRE-NOTIFICATION REQUIRED (DO FIRST)

Before submitting the DAR, you MUST send a CTEP Notification email to:  
**NCICTEPDAR@mail.nih.gov**

The CTEP Collaborator (Bristol Myers Squibb) has 14 calendar days to review.  
You may submit the DAR concurrently with sending the CTEP notification.  
Include a copy of the CTEP submission approval email with your DAR.

### CTEP Notification Email Template

```
To: NCICTEPDAR@mail.nih.gov
Subject: CTEP Notification — dbGaP DAR for phs003428.v1.p1 (CALGB/SWOG 80405)

Dear CTEP,

I am applying through the NIH database of Genotypes and Phenotypes (dbGaP) for access 
to data related to a NCI Cancer Therapy Evaluation Program (CTEP) clinical trial. I 
understand that this CTEP trial relates to a drug or agents provided by a CTEP 
Collaborator (Bristol Myers Squibb). I agree that I will allow the CTEP Collaborator a 
2-week review of the information related to my DAR so they will understand my intended 
use of the data generated using their proprietary agent(s). I understand that this CTEP 
review process takes place concurrently with my dbGaP project review, and that I can 
submit my dbGaP authorized access request as soon as I send this CTEP Notification. I 
will submit a copy of this CTEP Notification with my dbGaP access request.

For this review, I provide the following information from my dbGaP application:

a. My institution and contact information:
   [HUMAN_INPUT_REQUIRED: Full name, institution, street address, phone, email]

b. dbGaP Dataset name and accession number:
   CALGB/SWOG 80405 — phs003428.v1.p1

c. Research Use Statement:
   [See Research Use Statement below]

d. Non-Technical Summary:
   [See Non-Technical Summary below]

I understand that:
1. I will receive an acknowledgement of receipt from CTEP of this email.
2. I may or may not receive any feedback from the CTEP Collaborator.
3. If I do receive comments from the CTEP Collaborator, I will seriously consider them, 
   but they are not binding regarding my use of the CTEP data.
4. As specified in the Data Use Certification (DUC) for the dbGaP dataset I am 
   requesting, any manuscripts resulting from the use of CTEP da
